EXAMPLE LIST EXCLUSIONS:
An illustrated example of how you might sement and populate email marketing lists.
EMAIL LIST SEGMENTATION
Added to paid customer list 	Remove from sales follow up list
Added to VIP subscriber list 	Remove from general subscriber list
Added to sales follow up list 	Temporary stop sending general broadcasts
NOTE: This is a completely hypothetical example and your setup will vary.
